products.full_details: Neuros technology is offered on several models from the 700 Microliter™, 1700 Gastight® , and 7000 Modified Microliter series. These syringes are crafted to have very little to no dead volume which preserves the maximum amount of buffer and solution. Neuros syringes feature a blunt point (point style 3) or a beveled 12° point (point style 4); they also feature two different needle sleeves. The sleeve with a blind stop is perfect for cannulated applications and ensures targeted administration with an adjustable penetration depth. The version without a blind stop works best with stereotaxic holders. Both types provide an adjustable needle exposure of 0 to 20 mm.
products.long_description: Neuros technology is offered on several models from the 700 Microliter™, 1700 Gastight® , and 7000 Modified Microliter series. These syringes are crafted to have very little to no dead volume which preserves the maximum amount of buffer and solution. Neuros syringes feature a blunt point (point style 3) or a beveled 12° point (point style 4); they also feature two different needle sleeves. The sleeve with a blind stop is perfect for cannulated applications and ensures targeted administration with an adjustable penetration depth. The version without a blind stop works best with stereotaxic holders. Both types provide an adjustable needle exposure of 0 to 20 mm.

products.name: RapID Barcode Tags
products.title: RapID Tags
products.short_description: These advanced polymer eartags (from RapID® Lab, Inc.) are humane, automated, mini eartags providing fast and accurate identification. Suitable for lab animals such as mouse and rat. RapID eartags improve efficiency and lowers operational costs. The RapID tags are scannable and have multiple colours for visual identification.

buy_info.description: RapID Starter Kit, complete w. Appl/Remov Tool, Tags etc.
RapID-Scanner incl. USB cable and hands-free stand

products.full_details: The hardened 2-D barcode scans instantly with 100% accuracy providing millions of unique IDs. Multiple colours allow immediate secondary (visual) identification without scanning. RapID Tags are totally MRI and autoclave compatible, and are minimally invasive (no surgery required). RapID Tags are the new, cost-effective, smart solution for automated lab animal identification.The automation when reading the eartags eliminates identification errors and provides the easiest and fastest method for data collection compatible with study and colony management software and spreadsheet applications. RapID Tags have been industry-tested confirming their performance, tolerability and durability.We strongly recommend all new users to purchase the starter kit (RapID-SK) which not only is the most economical way to get the required equipment but also contains practice tags and manual literature. The Starter Kit includes:200 RapID Tags (40 of each colour)1 RapID Applicator1 RapID Removal Tool40 practice RapID Tags (with simulated ear membrane)RapID Tag Product GuideWebEx and Online Support Benefits of RapID Eartags2-D Barcodes Scan Instantly With 100% AccuracyWorks Seamlessly With Any Lab Management Software or ExcelMultiple Colors Allow Rapid Visual ID At a DistanceNo Surgery or Anesthesia Req. No Expensive Equipment Req.100% MRI/Autoclave CompatibleMore Humane Than Traditional Invasive ID MethodsNear-Zero Tissue Reactivity Using Biologically Inert MaterialsTiny Size (5mm x 5mm)Ultra-Light Weight (< 0.7 g)Used By Leading Labs Worldwide Our Genetically Engineered Model (GEM) colony management, and housing and breeding programs, include RapID Tags that integrate with our ICM™ (Internet Colony Management) system or can be integrated with the software you use at your facility. This ensures you get the right animal, at the right time, with reliable, comprehensive data from breeding to study readiness. READ MORE HERE

products.name: Implantable Chip
products.title: Implantable Chip
products.short_description: This is the smallest implantable ISO chip for animal idenfication in the world today. Not only is this the smallest ISO chip currently available both in length and in diameter, but also the needle used to inject the chip is much smaller than the previous injector. The PICO ID chip measures 7 x 1,25mm and has a Parylene coating for antimigrationAll three sizes has a Parylene coating for antimigration. It features a custom integrated circuit, coil and capacitor hermetically sealed in biocompatible glass with a unique, nonreplicable ID number. The ID chip is passive and is activated once within the readers’ electromagnetic field. The implanted chip then transmits its data to the reader within milliseconds. An adhesive with 6 labels for each number and with barcodes is delivered with each chip. Each chip is delivered preloaded in a syringe and sterilized in EO gas.

products.name: Ear Puncher
products.title: Ear Puncher
products.short_description: This stainless-steel ear punch tool is engineered for consistent,humane ear punchingduring ID marking and tissue collection.The sloped cutting edge cuts cleanly rather than crushing, requiring only gentle pressure—reducing wrist strain for staff and minimizing animal discomfort.The latest design features an integrated Eppendorf-lid holder (“puck”) that securely aligns a 1.5 mL tube lid, allowing the biopsy to drop directly into the tube—clean, fast, and ready for downstream genotyping.The punch is autoclavable; for long, trouble-free use, re-lubricate after sterilization according to your SOP.

buy_info.description: Ear punch pincer, hole 2mm OD Stainless Steel
Ear punch pincer, hole 2,75mm OD, Stainless Steel
Eppendorf Safe - Lock Tubes Colorless, 1.5 mL, 100pcs
Ear punch pincer, hole, 2,75mm Stainless Steel, for fish fins

products.full_details: Low-force action; sloped edge for a clean cutIntegrated holder for direct biopsy capture into 1.5 mL tubes (tubes also available in 100-packs)Durable stainless steel, autoclavable (re-lubricate after autoclaving)Variant AT7075-AQUA with larger opening for fish fin clippingAccurate identification is fundamental to study integrity. Among common mouse identification methods in research - temporary marker on fur, tattoo, visual ear tags, ear punch, and microchip (RFID) - ear punching remains a proven approach for rodents because it can combine ID marking and genotyping in a single, well-controlled step. With this ear punch you get crisp, repeatable holes that correspond to standard notch/hole maps, while the integrated tube-lid holder streamlines sample capture and minimizes handling time at the rack.The cutting geometry is the difference. Traditional punches can compress tissue before cutting; this tool’s sloped cutting edge shears cleanly, requiring less force and producing a more uniform hole. Technicians report less wrist fatigue across large cohorts, and supervisors appreciate the consistency that supports SOP compliance and audit trails. Because the instrument is autoclavable, it fits seamlessly into aseptic workflows - just remember to apply a suitable lubricant after sterilization to maintain smooth action. Good practice for ear punch miceFollow your IACUC/ethics SOPs for anesthesia/analgesia and asepsis. Mark according to a validated map to avoid ambiguity; avoid excessive tissue removal; and verify readability during routine checks. After use or autoclaving, clean and re-lubricate moving parts to preserve precision and longevity.Where this tool excelsHigh-throughput colony management, weaning and allocation, pre-genotyping tissue collection, and workflows that benefit from mouse ear punch ID plus immediate sample capture. For aquatic labs, theAT7075-AQUAvariant supports fish fin clipping with its larger opening.Related supplies1.5 mL Eppendorf-format tubes (available insets of 100) align with the built-in holder for efficient, spill-free collection. Ear punch (this tool): Immediate, visible ID; enables simultaneous tissue collection for genotyping; low consumable cost; ideal for colony management and early life stages per facility guidelines. However, marks are visible and - depending on patterning - can be limited in number.Microchip (RFID):Permanent, unique ID with automated scanning and minimal transcription error; excellent for long-term or regulated studies. Requires readers, implantation training, and higher per-animal cost; not typically used in very young neonates.In practice, many facilities use both: ear punch for rapid colony work and genotyping, microchip for definitive, long-term identity in selected cohorts.

products.name: Animal Fur Markers
products.title: Animal Markers
products.short_description: This animal marker pen is designed for quick, reliable identification of laboratory animals. It uses a non-toxic pigment (approved by the Japanese Ministry of Health for use in food, drugs, and cosmetics) that dyes the hair shaft rather than coating it, delivering moisture resistance and clear visibility for 6–12 weeks. Intended for fur, not skin, it’s ideal for short to medium study periods where shaving or hardware-based ID isn’t required. One marker typically covers ~300–500 animals, depending on size and application area.Fur-only application; not for skin or mucosaLasts 6–12 weeks and resists moistureNon-toxic pigment system; gloves/lab coats recommended (may stain skin/clothing)Not effective onblack fur

products.full_details: For facilities that need fast, readable IDs without introducing hardware or permanent marking, theseanimal markersoffers a practical balance of welfare, durability, and throughput. Because the formulation penetrates the hair fibers, marks remain legible through normal grooming and routine husbandry, then fade with hair turnover—making it well suited to neonatal litters, short observational studies, and interim identification before final selection or genotyping.How to use (best practice)Apply to clean, dry fur with a steady stroke, avoiding the skin. Allow a brief dry time before returning animals to the home cage. Reapply as the mark softens over time. Use gloves and a lab coat—pigments can stain. Follow local SOPs for handling near sensitive areas (eyes, nose, genital region) and avoid use on clipped/shaved skin.Coverage and visibilityA single pen typically marks 300–500 animals, depending on the symbol size and coat length. Visibility is best on light or mid-tone coats; these colours do not work on black fur. Are there animal-safe paint markers for temporary identification?Yes—this product is purpose-built as an animal-safe marker for temporary identification on fur. It uses a non-toxic pigment system and is intended for hair (not skin), providing 6–12 weeks of readability under normal husbandry. If you need a mouse tail marker (skin marking), choose a product explicitly validated for skin use; this pen is not intended for that purpose.What materials are animal markers made from?This pen uses non-toxic pigments approved by the Japanese Ministry of Health for use in food, drugs, and cosmetics, suspended in a carrier designed to penetrate hair shafts for better durability and moisture resistance. Full composition and handling guidance are available in the product SDS on request.Ear tag vs. microchip for pet identification?For pets, microchips provide permanent, unique identification readable by veterinary scanners and are the standard of care in many regions. Ear tags offer visible IDs but can be lost or removed and are less common for companion animals. For pets, consult your veterinarian and follow local regulations; our animal marker pen is intended for laboratory fur marking, not for permanent pet ID.

products.name: AIMS Tattoo
products.title: AIMS Tattoo
products.short_description: Convenient comprehensive kits for the humane tattoo identification of neonate or adult mice and rats.  Each kit is provided with a comprehensive training guide and instruction DVD as well as all the tools you need to safely and efficiently tattoo your rodents.The AIMS tattooing techniques are performed on un-anesthetized animals and produce permanent ID’s that are easy to read.  AIMS tattoo pigments and supplies have been used in the industry for over 25 years and have been demonstrated to be SAFE and NON-TOXIC.  Tattoo identification is very cost effective.
products.full_details: FEATURESTattoos are permanent for the life of the animal.Tattoos are easier and faster to read than other methods of identification.Animals can be tattooed very rapidly, up to 200 mice per hour.Tattoos can be used to identify day old mice or rats.Animal stress is minimal and the physiology status of animals is not altered.No need for anesthesia for rats or mice.The incidence of animal bites is reduced.Tattoos are routinely used to identify nude, athymic and transgenic animals.Tails can be saved in formalin with tissues as a positive source of identification.Tattooed tails do not fall off like ear tags. The AIMS ATS-3 General Rodent Tattoo System has supplies and accessories for tattooing approximately 3000 rodents. The detailed training guide & instruction DVD provide step-by-step guidance with detailed illustrations. Use numbers, letters, lines, dots, and/or colors to permanently ID any color/strain mouse or rat. Comes complete with AIMS standard tattoo machine w/calibrated needle tube, micro controller w/extended machine speed, AIMS humane rapid mouse cup restraint system, tail tattoo reading light, certified safe/nontoxic supplies and tattooing accessories, 242B concentrated black pigment for C57 & B6 mice. This system can be used for neonate rodent tattooing when purchased with the neonate accessory package.AIMS ultra-light tattoo machine.Foot pedal on/off micro-controller.AIMS small/large bore calibrated needle tube.Select large animal tattoo needles.Small equipment profile (quick setup/pickup).Reduced animal stress (quick tattooing).Easy cleaning & sterilization between animals.Detailed operating and tattooing instructions.Unlimited technical support from AIMS. NEO-9 Neonate Tattooing System was developed just for tattooing P0-P15 neonate rodents of any color/strain. This convenient kit comes complete with a micro controller w/HDUI power supply, foot pedal (on/off), preset speeds, ultra-light tattoo machine, non-skid machine platform with pigment holder, micro tattooing station (light, skin prep holder, 4x magnification), AIMS certified safe tattoo pigment, AIMS skin prep (reduce fading), standard/fine tip tattoo needles, finger guards, needle scanning scope, comprehensive DVD instructions, and carrying case. The detailed training guide provides step-by-step guidance and detailed illustrations on multiple ID schemes with large number ranges (> 9,000). Neonate tattoo identification is a practical and humane alternative to toe clipping (non-invasive). Toe tattoos allow you to use your existing numbering system without removing the toe. Included supplies will tattoo ~ 2000 neonates.AIMS ultra-light tattoo machine.Foot pedal on/off micro-controller.AIMS small/large bore calibrated needle tube.Select large animal tattoo needles.Small equipment profile (quick setup/pickup).Reduced animal stress (quick tattooing).Easy cleaning & sterilization between animals.Detailed operating and tattooing instructions.

products.name: Ear Tags
products.title: Laser Etched Animal Ear Tags
products.short_description: Animal ear tags in monelThe animal ear tags are produced in Monel which is a Nickel-Copper alloy that is used for its excellent combination of corrosion resistance, strength & flexibility. The tags are lightweight and can be used in chronic studies. The standard tags are laser etched for best visibility with number 0001–1000. The ear tags are also available with custom etched numbers or letters. The tag is easily applied with a special applicator.Custom numbering are available upon request e.g. A1001-A2000, B2001-B3000 etc.
products.full_details: Ear tags for lab animalsMouse and rat ear tags are used in research and lab animals, such as mice, rats, and other small animals.How to use animal ear tagsTheanimal identification ear tagsare easy to apply and provide a secure and durable seal. A hand-held ear tag applicator in stainless steel is used to seal the ear tag with minimal pressure. The ear tag applicator can be uses with or without the spring.Wash the ear tags in alcoholor disinfectantbefore applying the identification toprevent infection to the ear. Place the mouse or rat ear tag in the ear tag applicator, keeping the “hole” side with the identification number flat against the jaw of the ear tag applicator. Locate the tag on the ear, applying behind a ring of cartilage. After crimping, be sure the tag point has come through the hole and is bent over, securing the ear tag properly. Watch the video below for a demonstration of use.
products.long_description: Ear tags for lab animalsMouse and rat ear tags are used in research and lab animals, such as mice, rats, and other small animals.How to use animal ear tagsTheanimal identification ear tagsare easy to apply and provide a secure and durable seal. A hand-held ear tag applicator in stainless steel is used to seal the ear tag with minimal pressure. The ear tag applicator can be uses with or without the spring.Wash the ear tags in alcoholor disinfectantbefore applying the identification toprevent infection to the ear. subcategories.name: Restrainers & Tail Vein
subcategories.description: Restrainers are especially designed for allowing the animal to be introduced, adjusted and restrained with minimal trauma. The restrainers hold the animal safely in position during experimental procedures such as tail vein injection, blood sampling or blood pressure monitoring etc. The animal should be trained and conditioned for repeated studies to avoid unnecessary stress.

products.name: LE-Series Mouse
products.title: LE-Series Mouse
products.short_description: These restrainers are made from Perspex cylinders mounted on a flat black Perspex base. All the models have free access through both extremes, by opening the respective tilting door that is fixed by a screw at the upper part of the restrainer.A hole at the base of the door allows for the whole tail to be available for tail injections/ sampling, pulse transducer etc. The lateral holes and slots allow for good ventilation and access to the animal. The mouse model has a black nosecone for a less stressful environment and entry, and also access in the top of the restrainer.The available space for the animal can easily be adjusted by sliding the doors and fixating with the upper screws.

products.name: G-Series
products.title: G-Series
products.short_description: The G-Series provides comfortable containment of experimental animals to facilitate repeated measurements of physiological and pharmacological parameters. As for all confide space the animal should be preconditioned (trained) to accept appropriate periods in the chamber.It consists of a cylinder hinged to a base. On the top of the cylinder there are four slots and an end plate allowing adjustment of the cylinder length for different rodent sizes. The animal can be accessed through the cylinder slots or the hole in the base plate when accessing the animal from below.

products.name: Tailveiner Mouse
products.title: Tailveiner -  Restrainer for Mice
products.short_description: Tail vein injection made easier! The Tailveiner is the first easy-to-use mouse restrainer specifically designed for tail vein injections. Slotted tube permits the mouse to be quickly pulled in by the tail. The animal is then restrained by a plug which slides easily to accommodate any size mouse, but locks automatically when handle is released. After dosing, the handle is lifted and the plug is easily removed.The Tailveiner is the fastest restrainer yet for intravenous injections in small animals.

products.full_details: Advantages of the red tube vs. the opaque tube Laboratory rodents are largely color blind, so a red tube simply looks like a comforting shelter. The Red Tube is transparent, allowing the investigator to observe the animal inside for normal body position and breathing. products.name: Rotating Tail Injector
products.title: Rotating Tail Injector
products.short_description: Reduce time and increase productivity on mice tail injections and tattooing.The only mouse restrainer in which the tail can be rotated. This feature provides for easy access to either vein in the tail for an i.v. injection.Animal chamber accommodates mice weighing up to 45g. RTI is ideal to adequately restrain an un-anesthetized animal while having the tail vein straight in line with user's eyes for a successful injection. A pattern of air holes provide ventilation as well as a "toe-hold" for the mice. The unit sits comfortably on a bench top or in a laminar flow hood and it can be U.V. sterilized for use with immune-compromised mice. The raised table top lets user rest their hands to administer the injection.

products.name: Aesculap Isis
products.title: Aesculap Isis rodent shaver
products.short_description: The Isis shaver is a very small high quality shaver designed for shaving animal hair. It is delivered with a 2,4 cm wide blade that can cut as close as 0,1 mm to the skin. Thanks to the small footprint the Isis can be located very close to where the surgery takes place. The shaver can only be used without power cord, and stands firmly in its charger stand while charging the battery. An indicator light is illuminated while charging. categories.name: Wound Closure
categories.description:
Wound closure is a vital part of any successful surgeryand we carry and stock most items needed, no matter your preference being steril silk with a needle, Ethicon sutures or suture clips.

Wound closure is a vital part of any successful surgery

subcategories.name: Ethicon
subcategories.description:
Absorbable SuturesETHICON synthetic absorbable sutures exhibit a range of different characteristics and capabilities. From VICRYL RAPIDE Suture for effective short-term wound support, to VICRYL Suture for medium-term applications. ETHICON absorbable sutures perform optimally across the range of surgical needs.

Non-Absorbable SuturesNon-absorbable materials are used to suture tissues requiring long-term or permanent support in which the product strength is critical. They tend to be classed in two areas; whether they are monofilament or multifilament, and if they are natural or synthetic. ETHICON has a wide range of non-absorbable sutures to match today's demanding surgical procedures including the exceptionally smooth PROLENE Suture and the superior strength of braided ETHIBOND Suture.

products.name: Vicryl Rapid
products.title: Vicryl Rapid
products.short_description: Ethicon VICRYL Rapid is the fastest absorbable suture. It is braided for easy handling and secure knot tying. VICRYL Rapid has gone through special coating for quick absorption and for smooth passage through tissue and easy knot tie down.The suture is synthetic for minimal tissue reaction.

products.title: Vicryl
products.short_description: Ethicon VICRYL is probably the world’s most famous suture. It is together with Silk our most popular suture material. It is braided for easy handling and secure knot tying. VICRYL has a special coating for minimizing friction, smooth passage through tissue and easy knot tie down. The properties of VICRYL make it ideal for a wide range of applications when an absorbable suture is needed. It is synthetic for minimal tissue reaction.

products.name: Monocryl
products.title: Monocryl
products.short_description: Ethicon MONOCRYL is a soft suture with a monofilament structure for smooth passage through tissue. It is synthetic and causes minimal tissue reaction. Thanks to the properties of MONOCRYL it can be used in a wide range of applications. MONOCRYL is also less affected by needle holders than other monofilament sutures, although precaution is always advisable.

products.name: PDS II
products.title: PDS II
products.short_description: Ethicon PDS II is the second generation of monofilament sutures which structures provides a smooth passage through tissue. It is synthetic and causes minimal tissue reaction. Thanks to the extended time of tension strength in PDS II it has a wide range of surgical applications. As all monofilament sutures it is sensitive to mechanical stress e.g. needle holder why precaution should be used.

products.name: Prolene
products.title: Prolene
products.short_description: Ethicon PROLENE is a monofilament suture with very smooth surface and texture of synthetic fiber. These properties make PROLENE a very useful non-absorbable suture for smooth passage through tissue with minimal tissue reaction. PROLENE is biologically inert, and cause less inflammatory response in the tissue sutured than natural fibers, and do not degrade from the enzymes present in the body. The suture is eventually encapsulated by the healing tissue, and does not require removal by a physician.

products.name: Ethibond
products.title: Ethibond
products.short_description: Ethicon ETHIBOND is a multifilament braided suture for easy handling and secure knot tying. ETHIBOND is coated with polybutilate for smooth tie down and easy passage through tissue. The coating which acts as a lubricant to mechanically improve the physical properties of the uncoated suture by improving handling qualities as contrasted to the braided, uncoated fiber. The suture is synthetic for minimal tissue reaction.

products.name: Ethilon
products.title: Ethilon
products.short_description: Ethicon ETHILON is one of the most popular non-absorbable sutures. It has a monofilament structure for smooth passage through tissue while still providing strength and knot stability. It is a tissue friendly suture and is often used for skin suturing and is also available in very fine dimensions (11-0) making it also suitable for cosmetic surgery.

products.name: Silk
products.title: Ethicon Silk
products.short_description: SILK is a classical suture material. Ethicon SILK is made by the finest raw material from the cocoons of the silk wormBombyx Mori. After a thorough cleaning the material is braided with a special method called PERMA-HAND. This process gives the Ethicon SILK its characteristics of a smooth, strong suture with easy handling and knot stability.

subcategories.name: Needle Holders
subcategories.description: A needle holder is similar to a hemostat but is designed to provide a secure and firm grip of the needle for maximum control. Tips are gentle enough to prevent needle damage. Precision designed for balance. Many types available in either INOX Surgical Steel or with Tungsten Carbide Inserts in the tips for increased grip and prolonged life.

products.name: STILLE Olsen-Hegar
products.title: STILLE Olsen-Hegar
products.short_description: Olsen-HegarbySTILLE is a popular needle holder with scissors for suturing and cutting with the same instrument. Intended for 0 suture and finer. STILLE’s needle holders are easily recognized by their delicate and slim design, which helps holding the needle very secure. The gold handles indicate that the jaws are fitted with Tungsten Carbide inserts to prolong the instrument life.Stille is renowned for its unique, light and well-balanced instruments with strength for all types of tissue with minimal force, not just when new, but after many years of use.

buy_info.description: STILLE, Olsen Hegar Needle Holder with Scissors, 12cm

products.full_details: The slender design and excellent balance are the characteristics which make the STILLE Instruments easily recognizable. Their highly polished surface and delicate design make STILLE instruments lighter and easier to keep clean, thus more durable against discoloration and corrosion. All this provides STILLE instruments with a unique and outstanding feeling.HistoryStille is the only medical instrument maker in the world that still manufactures instruments from tubular steel in their own forge. For makers of precision surgical instruments, production has always maintained its artisanal character. They rely not only on drawings but, just as much, on their own sense of functionality and feature.A complete instrument works like a model. The dimensions are already in the hands. Instrument makers know the precise bend with their own fingers, and they know how a perfect instrument should feel in the human hand. Minimum defects are immediately evident. Instrument makers share that special fingertip sense of functionality with the surgeon.WarrantySurgical hand instruments manufactured by Stille carry a guarantee in respect of materials and workmanship. For a period of30 yearsafter purchase, we will replace or repair a damaged instrument free of charge if the damage is found to have been caused by a defect in materials or workmanship.The guarantee is conditional on the instrument being used for the purpose intended, is cared for and stored correctly and that any claims are made in in writing within 30 days of the damage occurring.

products.name: STILLE-Frimand DUO-GRIP
products.title: STILLE-Frimand DUO-GRIP
products.short_description: - Reduce suturing time and tissue manipulationThe finger grip and the palm grip are the most common needle holder grips for hand suturing in surgery. The major advantages of the palm grip are an increased versatility and the possibility to apply controlled force. However, there is a risk for a potential loss of precision and uncontrolled movement of the needle when disengaging the ratchet mechanism of the palmed instrument.STILLE-Frimand DUO-GRIPwas developed to overcome the above-mentioned disadvantages, hence facilitating palm and finger grip suturing, and offering the surgeon a more flexible and ergonomic instrument.Intended for 2/0 suture and finer.
products.full_details: This new and innovative needle holder reduces the suturing time and tissue manipulation as well as offering better ergonomics for the surgeon. The advantages are scientifically documented in two published studies where 32 surgeons evaluated the instrument.In summary, all participating surgeons reduced their suturing time by almost 20% and the traumatic tissue manipulation by more than 60%. After only 30 minutes, a majority of the surgeons preferred the Stille-Frimand DUO-GRIP to any traditional style needle holder.HistoryStille is the only medical instrument maker in the world that still manufactures instruments from tubular steel in their own forge. For makers of precision surgical instruments, production has always maintained its artisanal character. They rely not only on drawings but, just as much, on their own sense of functionality and feature.A complete instrument works like a model. The dimensions are already in the hands. Instrument makers know the precise bend with their own fingers, and they know how a perfect instrument should feel in the human hand. Minimum defects are immediately evident. Instrument makers share that special fingertip sense of functionality with the surgeon.WarrantySurgical hand instruments manufactured by Stille carry a guarantee in respect of materials and workmanship. For a period of30 yearsafter purchase, we will replace or repair a damaged instrument free of charge if the damage is found to have been caused by a defect in materials or workmanship.The guarantee is conditional on the instrument being used for the purpose intended, is cared for and stored correctly and that any claims are made in in writing within 30 days of the damage occurring.

products.name: Needle Holder with Scissors
products.title: Needle Holder with Scissors
products.short_description: This needle holder is a double spring instrument used for holding small, delicate needles in various microsurgical procedures. Below the tips it has a scissors with 3,5 mm cutting edge for cutting sutures.Cautionary noteNever use a micro needle holder with needles that are too thick, as this can easily damage the fine jaws. Use only micro needles of less than 0.2 mm diameter.

products.full_details: When you place heavy demands on your surgical instruments, be it scissors, needle holders, or forceps, you should consider the benefits of tungsten carbide, one of the hardest alloys available. Tungsten carbide scissors last almost two times longer than stainless steel, and needle holder tips can be made with a pyramid cross pattern that holds suture needles much more securely. Inlays are either glued or welded into place.Compare the extra cost of these instruments with the length of useful wear and you have a cost effective solution for your instrument requirements. Tungsten carbide instruments are identified by their gold handles.
